content: Modern PFM tools cluster around: account sync, auto-categorization, budgeting, net-worth dashboard, investment tracking, spending reports. YNAB=zero-based budgeting + discipline; Monarch=visibility/net-worth + investment holdings + couples sharing + alerts; Copilot=ML categorization + Tinder-swipe Review tab. Table stakes = sync, categorize, budget, spending breakdowns, net worth.
